title: Music in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Live outdoor music in the garden as the sun goes down. Walk the trails, listen to the band, grab a drink at the outdoor bar — peak Atlanta summer date energy, the kind that feels like a movie scene.

title: Prima Materia — Group Exhibition Opening
location: Empire Arts Gallery, Atlanta, GA
description: The origin point of transformation — artists reveal the sacred beginning of the creative act where pigment, gesture, and intention emerge from the unknown. A quiet, intentional gallery walk that's a great excuse to hold hands and talk about what you see.

title: Tumbao Dance Social ft. Alabama Dance Project (2 Rooms)
location: The Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Two-room Latin social — salsa in one room, bachata in the other, hosted every 2nd Saturday at the Academy Ballroom. Built-in beginner-friendly energy; perfect for a couple that wants to dance close, learn together, and stay out past midnight.

title: NE-YO & AKON: Nights Like This Tour 2026
location: Lakewood Amphitheatre, 2002 Lakewood Way SW, Atlanta, GA
description: Two R&B heavyweights on one stage — pure 2000s nostalgia singalong. Tailgate-style date: bring a blanket and a bottle of wine, stay for the slow jams under the lights.

title: La Placita — Dancing Under the Stars (Dunwoody)
location: Spruill Center for the Arts, 4681 Ashford Dunwoody Rd, Dunwoody, GA
description: Sunday-evening outdoor Latin social under the stars — DJ spinning salsa, bachata, and merengue on the lawn. Casual, family-friendly vibe until 9ish, then it turns into a grown-ups dance floor. Bring a blanket and a partner who'll let you lead.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Taste, vote, and celebrate at this plant-based chef showdown. Perfect for a foodie couple — walk the booths together, compare notes, pick a winner. A built-in conversation loop with zero date-night pressure.

title: Poetic Jazz: Prince Tribute Night
location: The Vick at Healey, 57 Forsyth St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: An intimate jazz-poetry spin on Prince's catalog. Candles, cocktails, and a small downtown crowd — the kind of low-key, soulful Tuesday that turns into a memory.

title: Cocktails in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Cocktails, live DJ, and the gardens lit up at golden hour. A timeless Atlanta date formula — wander the trails, grab a drink, sit by the fountain. Easy to dress up or down.

title: Styx & Chicago — The Windy Cities Tour
location: Ameris Bank Amphitheatre, 2200 Encore Pkwy, Alpharetta, GA
description: Two '70s rock institutions on one stage — sing-along classics from 'Carry On Wayward Son' to '25 or 6 to 4'. Lawn-seat date energy: blanket, snacks, and an open-air singalong that turns into a slow dance by the encore.

title: Karlous Miller at Helium Comedy Club (Couple's Package)
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
price: Couple's Package: 2 premium seats + $90 food & beverage credit
description: 85 South / Wild 'N Out star Karlous Miller in an intimate showroom — the venue literally sells a Couple's Package with reserved seating and a $90 F&B credit. Premium, no-stress date night with a guaranteed laugh.

title: Dexter Tolson & Friends — Vibes Jazz Cafe
location: Vibes Jazz Cafe at The Red Door, Atlanta, GA
description: Smooth, intimate jazz night in one of Atlanta's coziest listening rooms. Date-night classic: small stage, low light, two seats at the bar, and a musician who knows how to read a room.

title: Savanna Nights at Zoo Atlanta — Boy Bands & Girl Groups
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Cocktails, animal encounters, and a live Boy Bands & Girl Groups tribute set, all in the zoo after hours. Built-in 'first date' energy — fun, walkable, and full of moments to point and laugh at together.

title: Jimmy Buffett's Coral Reefer Band
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park, 4469 Stella Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Margaritaville energy under the trees at Chastain Park. Picnic + wine on the lawn, 'Margaritaville' singalong at sunset — the platonic ideal of a summer Atlanta date.

title: Phillippia and Yoshi — R&B Dinner & a Show
location: Perfect Note Atlanta, 1520 Federal Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: An intimate R&B dinner-and-a-show experience. Order off the menu, candles on the tables, two voices that can actually sing — the kind of date that feels like an anniversary without trying.

title: Reggae After Dark — Free Entry + Drink Until 11 PM
location: Cafe Circa, 464 Edgewood Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
price: Free entry; free drinks until 11 PM
description: Late-night reggae + dancehall vibes in the Old Fourth Ward / Edgewood corridor. Free entry and a free-drink window makes it a no-brainer Saturday nightcap — couples who want reggae energy without committing to a full amphitheater ticket.

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing a Song All Night Long
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Two Hall of Fame acts, one night of 'All Night Long' / 'September' energy. Bring a partner who likes to dance in the aisle — the whole arena becomes a wedding reception by the encore.

title: Atlanta Summer Halal Food Festival
location: Atlantic Station, 1380 Atlantic Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Inaugural halal food festival on the BeltLine-adjacent Atlantic Station lawn — global flavors from Palestine to Pakistan, plus live music and a family-friendly vibe. A walking, tasting, hand-holding kind of date that ends in dessert.

title: Rooftop Salsa & Bachata Social (Politan Row)
location: Politan Row at The Colony Square, 1197 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Sunday-night rooftop salsa + bachata with skyline views and a food hall downstairs. Beginner-friendly floor with instructors on hand — take a lesson together, then dinner or drinks at Politan Row after.

title: Amy Sherald: American Sublime — High Museum of Art (Final Stop)
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Final stop on the national tour of Georgia native Amy Sherald's most comprehensive exhibition to date. A meaningful, conversation-rich date — slow walk, big paintings, lunch in Midtown after.

title: The E.A.V. Comedy Show at El Sótano
location: El Sótano, Atlanta, GA (East Atlanta Village)
description: Stand-up showcase in the heart of EAV — a low-key Wednesday night that pairs perfectly with dinner and drinks on Flat Shoals Ave. Local comics, intimate room, easy midweek reset for couples.

title: Afro Caribbean vs Hip Hop & R&B — Embr Lounge
location: Embr Lounge, 1136 Crescent Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Two-room DJ showdown — Afrobeats/reggae/dancehall in one room, hip-hop and R&B in the other. Late-night Midtown dance floor, couples-friendly crowd, easy to slip in for an hour or stay till last call.

title: Dustin Ross at City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Storytelling-style stand-up with a wine-paired dinner option on-site. Date-night formula solved: dinner + show in one ticket, sit-down seats, no dance floor pressure.

title: Tropical Latin Night at Sanctuary Nightclub
location: Sanctuary Nightclub, Atlanta, GA
description: Friday-night Latin social — salsa, bachata, reggaetón rotation. A couples' favorite: take a lesson together on the floor, then order a mojito and a selfie.

title: Buju Banton & Stephen Marley: Roots and Rhymes Tour
location: Cellairis Amphitheatre at Lakewood, 2002 Lakewood Way SW, Atlanta, GA
description: A reggae double-header on the lawn — Bob Marley's son and a living legend together. Bring a blanket, bring a cooler, stay for the singalongs under the stars.

title: INNER VIEWS Art Exhibition — Opening
location: One Contemporary Gallery, 395 Edgewood Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: A collective musing on home, family, and community by 14 contemporary artists across multiple mediums. Quiet, thoughtful Saturday-afternoon gallery date in Edgewood — pair with lunch on the beltline.

title: Savanna Nights at Zoo Atlanta — Decades Night (Finale)
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: The final Savanna Nights of the summer — cocktails, animal encounters, and a Decades-night live set. Last-call romantic before the season closes; a memorable 'I can't believe we did that' kind of date.

title: Dinner and A Date: A Night of Soul — Apache XLR
location: Apache XLR, Atlanta, GA
description: A dedicated date-night soul show — the entire event is built around couples, dining, and live R&B. Easy, on-theme, Sunday-evening slow-dance material.

title: Unplugged: A Tribute to Anita Baker & Alicia Keys
location: The Betty, Buckhead, Atlanta, GA
description: Singer-songwriter tribute night honoring two queens of soulful R&B. Buckhead date-night setting — small room, two voices, candlelight, and a built-in reason to hold someone's hand during 'If I Ain't Got You.'
